label: Schwaan_2_non_myelinating
evidence: Supplementary Table 7 of the paper (and Extended Data Fig. 11) maps 'Schwaan_2_non_myelinating' to 'Schwann cells (non-myelinating)'. The main text and figure legends describe Schwann cell subtypes in skin—particularly, the distinction between myelinating and non-myelinating Schwann cells, in both prenatal (fetal) and adult skin. The label is an explicit cluster designation for this fine subtype.
